calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Fo Trust (Probate Code Sections 15403(A) And 17200)
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: David Cherman appeared in person for Susan Terri (petitioner).

Mr. Cherman stated that Mr. Starr is not related to the parties, and that he knows the petitioner. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
